articles.title: Oil Jumps as Conflict Over Hormuz Escalates With Fresh Strikes
articles.summary: Oil jumped as the US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes, with the sides offering conflicting statements on whether the Strait of Hormuz remains open.

articles.title: Oil Climbs, Treasuries Decline on Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Oil rose and Treasuries declined after the US launched another round of strikes against Iran, while conflicting claims over the status of the Strait of Hormuz heightened uncertainty.

articles.title: Season of Selling to End Philippine Peso Rally, Strategists Say
articles.summary: The Philippine peso’s relief rally following the initial US-Iran ceasefire is likely to be short-lived as seasonal selling drives the currency to new record lows, strategists say.

articles.title: Gold Declines as Renewed US-Iran Strikes Raise Rate-Hike Bets
articles.summary: Gold declined after the US and Iran exchanged strikes over the weekend, sending energy prices higher and once more raising the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat inflation.
